mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_code, role_name, status, deleted, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{status}, 0, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role
deleted = 0
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.status, r.deleted, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_by, r.updated_by FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT permission_id FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_by, updated_by) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
